name: Elimination
description: Directly remove players from the game, either through night kills or by influencing daytime votes.

name: Protection
description: Prevent players from being eliminated, by blocking night kills or influencing daytime votes to save targeted individuals.

name: Investigation
description: Gather information about other players' identities or roles to aid your faction in making informed decisions.

name: Manipulation
description: Influence the game's mechanics or other players' actions, often by changing votes, altering information, or controlling events.
